responses: Students can apply online through the Galgotias University admission portal. Admission is based on eligibility criteria and entrance requirements.
Eligibility depends on the selected course. Undergraduate programs generally require 10+2 while postgraduate programs require a relevant bachelor's degree.

Galgotias University provides scholarships based on academic performance, JEE/CUET scores, sports achievements and other merit criteria. Students can also apply for education loan and financial assistance programs.
Galgotias University provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls with WiFi, dining hall, gym, laundry and 24x7 security.

Galgotias University provides AC and Non-AC hostel facilities for boys and girls. Hostel fees depend on room type and facilities. Approximate hostel fees range from ₹90,000 to ₹1,60,000 per year including accommodation and mess facilities.

Galgotias University has a dedicated Training and Placement Cell that helps students with internships, skill development and campus recruitment. Major recruiters include Accenture, Infosys, Cognizant, Capgemini, Wipro, TCS, Amazon and many other national and multinational companies. The university regularly conducts placement drives, aptitude training, mock interviews and career development programs to improve student employability.

According to recent placement reports, the average placement package at Galgotias University is around 5.4 LPA. The average package may vary depending on the course, specialization, skills and placement cycle. Top-performing students often receive significantly higher offers.

BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications) is a 3-year undergraduate program focused on programming, web development, databases, software engineering, networking and computer applications. At Galgotias University, BCA helps students build strong technical skills for careers in software development, IT services, data analytics, web technologies and higher studies such as MCA. The program includes practical learning, projects, industry exposure and placement opportunities.

The annual tuition fee for BCA at Galgotias University is approximately Rs 92,000 per year. Additional charges such as examination fees, hostel fees and other university charges may apply as per university rules.

MCA (Master of Computer Applications) is a postgraduate program focused on software development, programming, databases, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, networking and advanced computer applications. At Galgotias University, MCA helps students develop technical, analytical and problem-solving skills required for careers in software engineering, web development, data analytics, cloud computing, cybersecurity and IT management. The program includes practical projects, industry exposure, internships and placement opportunities.

The annual tuition fee for MCA at Galgotias University is approximately Rs 1.64 lakh per year. Additional charges such as examination fees, hostel fees, registration fees and other university charges may apply according to university rules and policies.

At Galgotias University, CSE provides practical learning, industry projects, internships, coding experience and placement opportunities to prepare students for careers such as Software Developer, Data Scientist, AI Engineer, Cloud Engineer, Cyber Security Analyst and IT Consultant.

The annual tuition fee for BTech Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) at Galgotias University is approximately Rs 1.74 lakh per year. Additional charges such as examination fees, hostel fees, registration fees and other university charges may apply according to university rules and policies.
